summary: No ship: R-1 is behaviorally resolved and the e9b69c3 RED/L10 evidence matches. However, the plan cannot satisfy the static gate it explicitly requires. The revised selector/source split is already the simplest safe behavioral fix; no open question remains.

findings.title: B-1 cannot pass the gate it names without an undeclared test change
findings.body: B-1 changes all app/digest extraction sources to `image_spec` and requires `test_digest-exporter.bats` to remain green, but the existing gate explicitly requires app extraction from `image_id` at lines 51 and 72–74. Following the stated rule-only step therefore leaves the gate red, forcing the implementer to depart from the plan or get stuck. This is directly coupled to the R-1 revision because the gate must distinguish the retained `image_id` selectors from the new `image_spec` extraction sources.
findings.recommendation: Extend B-1 to update `tests/gates/test_digest-exporter.bats`: require two identical `image_id` selectors, require both app extractions and the digest extraction to source `image_spec`, and update the corresponding rule comments. Keep test changes outside behavioral `scope[]`.

next_steps: Amend B-1 with the required gate and rule-comment synchronization before implementation.
